item.title: ☕ jaigaresc/Poops-PS5-Java (48 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jaigaresc

📝 Repository: jaigaresc/Poops-PS5-Java

📄 Descrizione: Java implementation of the poops_ps5 sys_netcontrol UAF kernel exploit for PS5 BD-J. Achieves arbitrary kernel R/W, root privileges, enables Debug Settings, and deploys an ELF loader.

⭐ Stelle: 48

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: MIT License

item.title: ☕ shuangshuang-121/naruku (35 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shuangshuang-121

📝 Repository: shuangshuang-121/naruku

📄 Descrizione: narku是一个专门的excl解析工具，可以快速的解析上百万条excl数据和转换成csv的格式，可以和datax、doris配合做数据导入，或者用于数据解析。它在内存方面是安全的，基于poi但是不会出现内存溢出的问题，目前naruku还有数据备份的业务，但是这个业务还没有彻底完善，会在下个版本逐渐完善的。

⭐ Stelle: 35

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-01T01:52:31Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-03T06:19:09Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ jar-analyzer/jar-analyzer-engine (30 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jar-analyzer

📝 Repository: jar-analyzer/jar-analyzer-engine

📄 Descrizione: Java bytecode analysis engine built on ASM, extracts method call graphs, inheritance trees, Spring routes, and string constants from JAR/WAR into SQLite. AI-friendly output for security auditing.

⭐ Stelle: 30

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: bytecode call-graph code-audit java-asm java-bytecode static-analysis

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-19T13:44:01Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-23T07:58:11Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ shanqiu127/Warehouse-Management-System- (30 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shanqiu127

📝 Repository: shanqiu127/Warehouse-Management-System-

📄 Descrizione: 2026 届毕业设计作品：仓库管理系统。项目采用前后端分离架构，前端基于 Vue 3 + Vite，后端基于 Spring Boot + MyBatis-Plus，数据库使用 MySQL。系统围绕实际仓储业务场景，完成了用户与权限管理、基础资料维护、进销退存流程、统计分析与可视化展示，具备完整的开发、部署与演示能力。

⭐ Stelle: 30

🍴 Forks: 7

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-18T14:11:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-24T02:30:35Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ AdamBien/enterprisifier-example (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: AdamBien

📝 Repository: AdamBien/enterprisifier-example

📄 Descrizione: EnterpriseGreetingFramework™ — A production-grade, hexagonally-architected, event-sourced, CQRS-enabled, saga-orchestrated solution for printing "hello, world". Features 73 classes, 19 packages, a factory-of-factories, and an Anti-Corruption Layer. Because IO.println was a monolith.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: airails airhacks bce-design java llm

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-01T04:29:45Z

item.title: ☕ tryfovik/getboot (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tryfovik

📝 Repository: tryfovik/getboot

📄 Descrizione: getboot 是一组面向 Spring Boot 3 的基础能力模块。它不是再造一套大而全的后台脚手架，而是把业务服务里最常重复、最容易散落、又最难持续维护的一批基础能力收成可复用、可按需引入的 starter。

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-29T15:14:47Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-02T13:07:12Z
